SELECT "e"."EnhancementRequestId" AS "RequestId", (
    SELECT "e0"."RiskLevel"
    FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e0"
    WHERE "e0"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
        SELECT "r0"."value"
        FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r0"
    ) AND "e"."EnhancementRequestId" = "e0"."EnhancementRequestId"
    ORDER BY "e0"."Version" DESC
    LIMIT 1) AS "Risk"
FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e"
WHERE "e"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
    SELECT "r"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

    SELECT "e0"."RiskLevel"
    FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e0"

FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e"
WHERE "e"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
    SELECT "r"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

    SELECT "e0"."RiskLevel"
    FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e0"
    WHERE "e0"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
        SELECT "r0"."value"
        FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r0"
    ) AND "e"."EnhancementRequestId" = "e0"."EnhancementRequestId"
    ORDER BY "e0"."Version" DESC
    LIMIT 1) AS "Risk"
FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e"
WHERE "e"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
    SELECT "r"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

SELECT "e"."EnhancementRequestId" AS "RequestId", (
    SELECT "e0"."RiskLevel"
    FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e0"
    WHERE "e0"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
        SELECT "r0"."value"
        FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r0"
    ) AND "e"."EnhancementRequestId" = "e0"."EnhancementRequestId"
    ORDER BY "e0"."Version" DESC
    LIMIT 1) AS "Risk"
FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e"
WHERE "e"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
    SELECT "r"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

SELECT "e"."EnhancementRequestId" AS "RequestId", (
    SELECT "e0"."RiskLevel"
    FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e0"
    WHERE "e0"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
        SELECT "r0"."value"
        FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r0"
    ) AND "e"."EnhancementRequestId" = "e0"."EnhancementRequestId"
    ORDER BY "e0"."Version" DESC
    LIMIT 1) AS "Risk"
FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e"
WHERE "e"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
    SELECT "r"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

)

)

SELECT "e"."EnhancementRequestId" AS "RequestId", (
    SELECT "e0"."RiskLevel"
    FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e0"
    WHERE "e0"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
        SELECT "r0"."value"
        FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r0"
    ) AND "e"."EnhancementRequestId" = "e0"."EnhancementRequestId"
    ORDER BY "e0"."Version" DESC
    LIMIT 1) AS "Risk"
FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e"
WHERE "e"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
    SELECT "r"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

LEFT JOIN "Repositories" AS "r" ON "a"."Id" = "r"."ApplicationId"
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "Teams" AS "t"
    WHERE "t"."Id" = "a"."OwnerTeamId" AND "t"."TenantId" = @__tenantId_0)
ORDER BY "a"."Name", "a"."Id"

FROM "EnhancementRequests" AS "e"
LEFT JOIN "Applications" AS "a0" ON "e"."TargetApplicationId" = "a0"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Users" AS "u0" ON "e"."SubmittedByUserId" = "u0"."Id"
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "Users" AS "u"
    WHERE "u"."Id" = "e"."SubmittedByUserId" AND "u"."TenantId" = @__tenantId_0) OR ("e"."TeamId" IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "Teams" AS "t"
    WHERE "t"."Id" = "e"."TeamId" AND "t"."TenantId" = @__tenantId_0)) OR ("e"."TargetApplicationId" IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "Applications" AS "a"
    WHERE "a"."Id" = "e"."TargetApplicationId" AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Teams" AS "t0"
        WHERE "t0"."Id" = "a"."OwnerTeamId" AND "t0"."TenantId" = @__tenantId_0)))

SELECT "e"."EnhancementRequestId" AS "RequestId", (
    SELECT "e0"."RiskLevel"
    FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e0"
    WHERE "e0"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
        SELECT "r0"."value"
        FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r0"
    ) AND "e"."EnhancementRequestId" = "e0"."EnhancementRequestId"
    ORDER BY "e0"."Version" DESC
    LIMIT 1) AS "Risk"
FROM "EnhancementAnalyses" AS "e"
WHERE "e"."EnhancementRequestId" IN (
    SELECT "r"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__requestIds_0) AS "r"
)
GROUP BY "e"."EnhancementRequestId"

)
